mapper.select:
SELECT changed.user_id FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT e.user_id FROM tb_diary_trait_evidence e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MAX(updated_at) AS latest_profile_updated_at FROM tb_user_trait_profile GROUP BY user_id ) p ON p.user_id = e.user_id WHERE p.latest_profile_updated_at IS NOT NULL AND e.updated_at > p.latest_profile_updated_at
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT s.user_id FROM tb_diary_analysis_state s INNER JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MAX(updated_at) AS latest_profile_updated_at FROM tb_user_trait_profile GROUP BY user_id ) p ON p.user_id = s.user_id WHERE s.analysis_status = 'STALE' AND s.updated_at > p.latest_profile_updated_at
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT e.user_id FROM tb_diary_trait_evidence e INNER JOIN tb_diary d ON d.diary_id = e.diary_id AND d.user_id = e.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN tb_mst_trait_definition t ON t.trait_key = e.trait_key AND t.is_active = 1 AND t.trait_scope = 'CORE' AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.auto_apply_enabled = 1 WHERE e.is_active = 1 AND e.confidence >= 0.700 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user_trait_profile p WHERE p.user_id = e.user_id ) ) changed ORDER BY changed.user_id

SELECT e.trait_key AS trait_key, SUM(e.signal_score * e.confidence) AS long_term_weighted_score_sum, SUM(e.confidence) AS long_term_confidence_sum, COUNT(*) AS evidence_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.diary_date >= #{recentFromDate} THEN e.signal_score * e.confidence ELSE 0 END) AS recent_weighted_score_sum, SUM(CASE WHEN d.diary_date >= #{recentFromDate} THEN e.confidence ELSE 0 END) AS recent_confidence_sum FROM tb_diary_trait_evidence e INNER JOIN tb_diary d ON d.diary_id = e.diary_id AND d.user_id = e.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN tb_mst_trait_definition t ON t.trait_key = e.trait_key AND t.is_active = 1 AND t.trait_scope = 'CORE' AND t.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND t.auto_apply_enabled = 1 WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} AND e.is_active = 1 AND e.confidence >= #{confidenceThreshold} GROUP BY e.trait_key HAVING SUM(e.confidence) > 0 ORDER BY e.trait_key
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_user_trait_profile ( user_id, trait_key, long_term_score, recent_score, confidence, evidence_count, calculated_date, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{profile.userId}, #{profile.traitKey}, #{profile.longTermScore}, #{profile.recentScore}, #{profile.confidence}, #{profile.evidenceCount}, #{profile.calculatedDate}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE long_term_score = VALUES(long_term_score), recent_score = VALUES(recent_score), confidence = VALUES(confidence), evidence_count = VALUES(evidence_count), calculated_date = VALUES(calculated_date), is_active = 1, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_user_trait_profile SET is_active = 0, calculated_date = #{calculatedDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 AND trait_key NOT IN
#{traitKey}
UPDATE tb_user_trait_profile SET is_active = 0, calculated_date = #{calculatedDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
